content.text: {"id":"KB-003","title":"Refund Timelines","category":"returns","summary":"How long refunds take to appear on your account.","body":"After we receive your return, refunds are processed within 5\u20137 business days. Credit card refunds may take an additional 3\u20135 business days to appear on your statement depending on your card issuer. Original shipping charges are not refunded unless the return is due to our error. Store credit refunds are instant once approved.","url":"https://help.example.com/returns/refund-timelines","last_updated":"2026-03-15"}
